zh: 你有一个大家庭。
en: You have a big family.

zh: 这是你的父亲吗？
en: Is this your father?

zh: 是的。他是一位体育老师。
en: Yes, it is. He's a PE teacher.

zh: 你妈妈是做什么工作的？
en: What's your mother's job?

zh: 她是一名医生。
en: She's a doctor.

zh: 医生真了不起！我爸爸也是医生。
en: Doctors are great! My father is a doctor too.

zh: 他是一名工厂工人。
en: He's a factory worker.

zh: 他是一名农民。
en: He's a farmer.

zh: 她是一名护士。
en: She's a nurse.

zh: 她是一名办公室职员。
en: She's an office worker.

zh: 我爷爷会教中文。
en: My grandpa can teach Chinese.

zh: 他会做漂亮的椅子。
en: He can make nice chairs.

zh: 我奶奶会做好吃的午饭。
en: My grandma can make good lunches.

zh: 妈妈和爸爸又忙又累，我们能为他们做什么呢？
en: Mum and dad are busy and tired. What can we do for them?

zh: 我们可以做些家务。
en: We can do some chores.

zh: 我们也可以做一份礼物！
en: We can also make a gift!

zh: 我照顾我的妹妹。
en: I look after my sister.

zh: 我们扫地。
en: We sweep the floor.

zh: 我们一起做饭。
en: We cook together.

zh: 我们在一起很快乐。
en: We are happy together.

zh: 妈妈，你是一位了不起的护士，你帮助了很多人！
en: Mum, you are a great nurse. You help many people!

zh: 妈妈，我现在是个大男孩了。我会扫地，会做饭，也会照顾我的小妹妹！
en: Mum, I am a big boy now. I can sweep the floor. I can cook. I can look after my baby sister too!

zh: 我妈妈是一位作家，她写了很多好书。
en: My mum is a writer. She writes a lot of good books.

zh: 妈妈也是一位厨艺高超的厨师，她能做出美味的食物！
en: Mum is also a great cook. She can cook great food!

zh: 妈妈非常忙，我们可以在家帮她。
en: Mum is very busy. We can help her at home.

zh: 她是一位了不起的妈妈！
en: She's a great mum!

zh: 妈妈，我有一个新朋友。
en: Mum, I have a new friend.

zh: 真的吗？你朋友叫什么名字？
en: Really? What's your friend's name?

zh: 你瞧！他又高又壮。
en: Look! He's tall and strong.

zh: 他还很善良，经常帮助我。
en: He's also kind. He often helps me.

zh: 我有一个朋友，她有长头发和蓝眼睛。
en: I have a friend. She has long hair and blue eyes.

zh: 蒂姆是我的朋友，他是个好男孩，他又高又瘦。
en: Tim is my friend. He's a good boy. He's tall and thin.

zh: 莉莉是我的朋友，她是个好女孩，她安静又善良。
en: Lily is my friend. She's a good girl. She's quiet and kind.

zh: 我没有壳，我们可以分享吗？
en: I have no shell. Can we share?

zh: 你可以和我共用我的壳！
en: You can share my shell!

zh: 你最好的朋友是谁？
en: Who's your best friend?

zh: 陈洁，她很有趣，经常让我微笑。
en: Chen Jie. She's funny. She often makes me smile.

zh: 我最好的朋友是约翰，他非常善良，经常帮我学英语。
en: My best friend is John. He's very kind. He often helps me with English.

zh: 他经常和我一起读书。
en: He reads books with me.

zh: 他帮我学语文。
en: He helps me with Chinese.

zh: 我们一起玩游戏。
en: We play games together.

zh: 刘佳很高，她有长头发，经常和我一起读书。
en: Liu Jia is tall. She has long hair. She often reads books with me.

zh: 她喜欢写作，但我喜欢球类运动，我经常踢足球和打篮球。
en: She likes writing, but I like ball games. I often play football and basketball.

zh: 刘佳很善良，她总是让我微笑，我们是最好的朋友。
en: Liu Jia is kind. She always makes me smile. We are best friends.

zh: 他有小眼睛和非常大的耳朵。
en: He has small eyes and very big ears.

zh: 他的腿很短，但身体很长。
en: He has short legs, but his body is very long.

zh: 他喜欢公园，我们经常在这里玩游戏。
en: He likes the park. We often play games here.

zh: 你的邻居们非常友好。
en: Your neighbours are very friendly.

zh: 这里有一个操场，我们经常在那里玩。
en: There is a playground. We often play there.

zh: 那边还有一个漂亮的公园。
en: There is also a nice park over there.

zh: 这是一个图书馆，里面有很多书。
en: This is a library. There are so many books.

zh: 我最喜欢的地方是博物馆，那里有很多古老的东西和照片。
en: My favourite place is the museum. There are many old things and photos.

zh: 博物馆旁边还有一家漂亮的商店，人们在那里买礼物和书。
en: There is also a nice shop. People buy gifts and books there.

zh: 博物馆在一个漂亮的公园里，我爱那个博物馆！
en: The museum is in a nice park. I love that museum!

zh: 嗨！我是彼得，来自伦敦，今天是我在这里的第一天。
en: Hi! I'm Peter. I'm from London. It's my first day here.

zh: 这里有很棒的人和很好的地方，我爱成都！
en: There are nice people and great places here. I love Chengdu!

zh: 我们的邻居是一名消防员，他经常帮助别人。
en: Our neighbour is a firefighter. He often helps people.

zh: 他是一名校车司机，每天送我们去上学。
en: He's a school bus driver. He takes us to school every day.

zh: 那也是一份重要的工作！
en: That's an important job too!

zh: 他是一名清洁工，他清洁社区。
en: He's a cleaner. He cleans the community.

zh: 我的邻居是一名警察，她帮助了很多人。
en: My neighbour is a police officer. She helps a lot of people.

zh: 陈洁正在整理床铺。
en: Chen Jie is making the bed.

zh: 张鹏正在唱老歌。
en: Zhang Peng is singing old songs.

zh: 彬彬和约翰正在讲笑话，大家都很开心！
en: Binbin and John are telling funny stories. Everyone is happy!

zh: 不要在那里游泳，那里不安全。
en: Don't swim there. It's not safe.

zh: 不要闯红灯！
en: Don't cross at a red light!

zh: 我们应该互相帮助。
en: We should help each other.

zh: 嗨，马克！我是约翰。悉尼的天气怎么样？
en: Hi, Mark! This is John. What's the weather like in Sydney?

zh: 今天是晴天。
en: Well, it's sunny today.

zh: 热吗？不热，现在是21度。
en: Is it hot? No, it isn't. It's 21 degrees.

zh: 北京只有2度，哇！真冷！
en: It's only two degrees in Beijing. Wow! It's cold!

zh: 北京明天天气怎么样？天气凉爽，阳光明媚。
en: What's the weather like in Beijing tomorrow? It's cool and sunny.

zh: 哈尔滨的天气怎么样？又冷又有雪。
en: What's the weather like in Harbin? It's cold and snowy.

zh: 约翰，现在下雨了。
en: John, it's raining now.

zh: 哦不！我们没法在公园打篮球了。
en: Oh no! We can't play basketball in the park.

zh: 没关系，我们可以去图书馆。
en: It's OK. We can go to the library.

zh: 我们去看电影吧，好主意！
en: Let's go and see a film. That's a good idea!

zh: 天气又冷又下雨，我们不能踢足球，但我们可以在家做卡片。
en: It's cold and rainy. We can't play football. But we can make cards at home.

zh: 下雪天，我们可以堆雪人。
en: On snowy days, we can make a snowman.

zh: 天气又冷又下雨，我们可以穿上雨衣和靴子，出去在雨中跳舞。
en: It's rainy and cool. We can wear raincoats and boots. Let's go out and dance in the rain.

zh: 妈妈，这件毛衣是谁的？是你爸爸的。
en: Whose sweater is this, Mum? It's your dad's.

zh: 这些袜子是谁的？是我的。
en: Whose socks are these? They're mine.

zh: 我今天可以穿这件新衬衫吗？
en: Can I wear this new shirt today?

zh: 可以，但也要穿上外套，外面又冷又有风。
en: Yes, but wear a coat too. It's cold and windy outside.

zh: 莎拉，你喜欢哪个季节？
en: Sarah, which season do you like?

zh: 冬天，下很多雪，我可以在雪地里玩，堆雪人。
en: Winter. It snows a lot. I can play in the snow and make a snowman.

zh: 我也喜欢冬天，有很多节日，我和家人经常聚在一起，玩得很开心。
en: I like winter too. There are many festivals. My family and I often get together and have fun.

zh: 春天是绿色的，充满生机，我散步放风筝。
en: Spring is green. It's full of life. I take many walks and fly my kite.

zh: 夏天是蓝色的，我玩游戏唱歌，穿裙子和T恤，白天很长。
en: Summer is blue. I play games and sing songs. Wear dresses and T-shirts. The days are so long.

zh: 秋天是橙色的，我喜欢落叶，穿毛衣和衬衫，品尝月饼。
en: Autumn is orange. I like the falling leaves. I wear sweaters and shirts. And enjoy mooncakes.

zh: 冬天是白色的，我和朋友堆雪人，穿暖和的外套和手套，然后春天又来了。
en: Winter is white. I make a snowman with friends. Wear warm coats and gloves. Then spring comes again.

zh: 你的外套在哪里？外面非常冷。
en: Where is your coat? It's very cold outside.

zh: 我没有外套，但我有一件暖和的毛衣。
en: I don't have a coat, but I have a warm sweater.

zh: 你在圣诞节通常做什么？
en: What do you usually do on Christmas Day?

zh: 我穿上短裤和T恤去海滩。
en: I put on my shorts and T-shirt and go to the beach.

zh: 是的，但晚上比较凉，我需要穿一件毛衣。
en: Yes, but it's cool at night. I need to wear a sweater.

zh: 雪人喜欢寒冷的天气。
en: Snowmen love cold weather.
